stemHtml: On a piston engine aircraft, the vent lines in the fuel system are installed to…

options.a: allow a person to take a sample of the fuel and to empty the fuel tank for maintenance.
options.b: allow the excess fuel to flow out of the tank after refuelling.
options.c: remove particles and impurities from the fuel that could damage the engine.
options.d: allow atmospheric pressure to enter the fuel tank in order to avoid a vacuum.
